seo.title: Insanity: The Asylum Vol 2 Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Blowtorch belly fat and eliminate love handles with Insanity: The Asylum Vol 2. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Shaun T is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as Transform :20®, INSANITY®, CIZE®, and LET’S GET UP!™ Whether you’re new to exercise or a HIIT veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Keep a towel handy and be prepared to sweat—with Shaun T, it’s always go time.

data.descriptionShort: Get better weight-loss results in less time with INSANITY: THE ASYLUM® VOLUME 2.
data.descriptionLong: These fat-scorching workouts will improve your speed & agility, your strength, core, legs and glutes. You’ll engage every inch of your core, helping you blowtorch belly fat and eliminate love handles.

modules.equipment: Agility Ladder, BOD Rope, Dumbbells or Resistance Bands, Chin-Up Bar*, Resistance Loops*, Yoga Mat*
modules.categories: Athletic Training, Cardio, Bootcamp, Core, Strength, Weight Loss

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPZVay.title: Agility Tutorial
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvPZVay.descriptionLong: Shaun T gives you a step-by-step breakdown of his 8 mind-twisting agility moves, so you’ll be a pro when it comes time to hop in the ladder. Don’t be fooled by the title. . . This “tutorial" is a competitive workout in itself. How fast can you break out?

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.
